T-004R_vwap_reclaim_long_30m_W100_slow.lesson: VWAP reclaim context alone did not survive OOS, cost, drawdown, or statistical controls.

T-008R_vwap_reject_short_30m_W100.lesson: Short-side VWAP rejection remained broad, costly, and regime unstable.

T-012_vwap_above_rising_30m_W100.lesson: The only apparent near miss was blocked after hardening by drawdown and negative market replay.

T-014_vwap_pullback_long_15m_W50_fast.lesson: Side integrity was clean, but the fast 15m pullback family had no edge after cost, OOS, statistics, or replay.

cost_dominated.mitigation: Require low spread/cost filters, slower forward sets, and lower churn.

oos_unstable.mitigation: Split by session and broad-market regime before another wave.

regime_sensitive_candidate.mitigation: Gate by SPY/QQQ direction and avoid mixed-regime samples.

drawdown_excessive.mitigation: Prefer W50 over W100 where possible and require replay not negative before confirmation.

side_mismatch.mitigation: Keep expected_side explicit and material in execution contract integrity.

operationally_unavailable.mitigation: Avoid candidates whose fill probability or cost shock already fails in research.

candidate_families.name: 30m_W50_vwap_above_rising_long_low_cost_mid_session
candidate_families.rationale: Attacks T-014 cost dominance and T-012 drawdown by slowing the horizon while avoiding close/open noise.

candidate_families.name: 30m_W50_vwap_below_falling_short_low_cost_mid_session
candidate_families.rationale: Tests the symmetric short hypothesis without repeating the previous side-mismatched reject-short shape.

candidate_families.name: 1h_W100_vwap_above_rising_long_spy_qqq_positive_regime
candidate_families.rationale: Uses broad-market agreement and slower bars to reduce OOS/regime instability.

candidate_families.name: 1h_W100_vwap_below_falling_short_spy_qqq_negative_regime
candidate_families.rationale: Only worth considering if downside regime labels are available and cache readiness is explicit.

candidate_families.name: 30m_W50_vwap_pullback_long_low_spread_no_close_session
candidate_families.rationale: Retests pullback only after removing the 15m fast-cost failure mode.

recommended_primary.name: 30m_W50_vwap_above_rising_long_low_cost_mid_session
recommended_primary.reason: Best first response to the repeated cost/OOS failures without jumping to a much smaller 1h sample.

recommended_secondary.name: 1h_W100_vwap_above_rising_long_spy_qqq_positive_regime
recommended_secondary.reason: Best backup if Director wants a stronger regime gate before any new VWAP wave.

rejected_options.name: repeat_15m_W50_vwap_pullback_long_fast
rejected_options.reason: T-014 already completed with 0 accepted and universal cost/OOS/stat/replay failures.

rejected_options.name: broad_VWAP_without_cost_or_regime_filter
rejected_options.reason: All reviewed VWAP families show cost and regime instability.

rejected_options.name: confirmation_or_shadow_from_T014
rejected_options.reason: No candidate passed OOS PF, cost x2, FDR/WRC/SPA, or market replay gates.
